evals.prompt:
Implement the following tech spec:

---
title: Add CSV Export
status: ready-for-dev
---

## Overview
Add CSV export functionality to the reports page.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Given a user on the reports page, when they click 'Export CSV', then a CSV file downloads containing all visible report rows
- Given a report with date columns, when exported, then dates are formatted as YYYY-MM-DD
- Given an empty report, when export is clicked, then a CSV with only headers downloads

## Tasks
1. Create `src/utils/csv-export.ts` with `exportToCsv(data, columns)` function
2. Add 'Export CSV' button to `src/components/ReportsPage.tsx`
3. Wire button click to trigger CSV download
4. Add tests for csv-export utility
5. Add integration test for export button
evals.expected_output: Mode A detection (tech spec provided), skip Phase 2 entirely, go straight to TDD execution of the 5 tasks in order, no re-planning or unnecessary context gathering
